Who We Are

About Carivo

Carivo is a leading consultancy specializing in citizenship and residency by investment across the Caribbean. We guide clients through every step with full confidentiality and professional care.

🏆
Trusted Experts
Our certified advisors have guided hundreds of families to successful second citizenship across all four Caribbean programs.
🔒
Full Confidentiality
All personal and financial information is handled under strict confidentiality protocols and data protection standards.
⚡
Efficient Processing
We streamline every aspect of your application to minimize delays and ensure documentation meets all government requirements.
🌎
Global Network
We partner with international legal professionals, banks, and real estate developers for end-to-end support worldwide.
Why Invest

Benefits of Citizenship by Investment

A second passport is more than a travel document — it opens doors across finance, education, security, and lifestyle.

💼
Investment & Returns
Real estate investments in the Caribbean offer strong ROI while qualifying for citizenship. Government donation options from $90,000 USD provide a straightforward route without property management.
✈️
Visa-Free Travel
Travel to 140–155 countries without a visa — EU Schengen, UK, Singapore, Hong Kong. True freedom of movement for your entire family.
💰
Financial Optimization
Most Caribbean CBI countries impose no tax on global income, capital gains, inheritance, or net worth. Legally optimize your tax position.
👪
Family Security
Include spouse and dependent children in one application. Give your entire family global mobility and a better life.
🏠
Real Estate Asset
Own property in the Caribbean. Qualify for citizenship while generating rental income and benefiting from long-term property appreciation.
🎓
Global Education
A second passport removes barriers for your children — top universities in the UK, US, Canada, and Europe with fewer visa restrictions.
Programs

Our Citizenship Programs

Four prestigious Caribbean programs — each offering a powerful passport, flexible investment options, and a clear path to a better future.

🇩🇲
⏱ 6 Months
Commonwealth of Dominica
Nature's Isle — Most Affordable CBI Program

Dominica's program (est. 1993) is the world's most reputable affordable CBI. Powerful passport with no residence requirements and investment from $90,000 USD.

⏱ 6 Months🌎 140+ Countries💵 From $90K
  • Visa-free to EU Schengen Area (26 countries)
  • Visa-free access to United Kingdom
  • No residence requirement at any stage
  • Include spouse, children & parents in one application
Read Full Program Details →
🇰🇳
⏱ 12 Months
Saint Kitts and Nevis
The World's Oldest CBI Program — Since 1984

Est. 1984, the world's first CBI program. Renowned for prestige and strict due diligence, with one of the strongest Caribbean passports — 155+ visa-free countries.

⏱ 12 Months🌎 155+ Countries💵 From $120K
  • 155+ countries visa-free: UK, Schengen, Singapore
  • No income, capital gains, or inheritance tax
  • Citizenship for life — inheritable by descendants
  • Accelerated application option available
Read Full Program Details →
🇦🇬
⏱ 12 Months
Antigua and Barbuda
365 Beaches — One for Every Day of the Year

Launched 2013, among the world's most popular CBI programs. 150+ visa-free countries, only 5 days residency every 5 years, investment from $90,000 USD.

⏱ 12 Months🌎 150+ Countries💵 From $90K
  • Visa-free to UK, EU Schengen, Canada
  • Only 5 days residency required every 5 years
  • Dual citizenship explicitly permitted
  • Include spouse, children, parents & siblings
Read Full Program Details →
🇬🇩
⏱ 12 Months
Grenada
Only Caribbean CBI with US E-2 Visa Treaty

The only Caribbean CBI nation with an active US E-2 Treaty — Grenadian citizens can live and work in the USA. Also unique: visa-free access to China.

⏱ 12 Months🌎 140+ Countries🇺🇸 US E-2 Visa
  • Only Caribbean CBI eligible for US E-2 Investor Visa
  • Visa-free access to China (unique in the Caribbean)
  • Visa-free to UK and EU Schengen Area
  • No visit required during the application
Read Full Program Details →

How It Works

Our 5-Step Process

From initial consultation to receiving your passport, Carivo guides you through every step with clarity and professionalism.

01
Free Consultation
We assess your profile and family situation to recommend the most suitable program.
02
Document Preparation
We compile, verify, and translate all required documents to government standards.
03
Investment & Filing
We handle the investment transaction and submit your complete application.
04
Government Review
The government conducts thorough due diligence and background checks on all applicants.
05
Passport Issued
Upon approval, you take the oath of allegiance and receive your new passport!

Legal

Terms & Help

Carivo operates as an independent advisory consultancy providing professional guidance on citizenship by investment programs. All programs are legally established by the respective sovereign governments. Carivo does not guarantee application approval — all final decisions rest with the relevant government authority. Investment amounts and program terms are subject to change per government policy. All client information is handled under strict confidentiality. Advisory fees are for Carivo's professional services only.

Carivo

Your trusted partner for Caribbean citizenship and residency by investment. Legal, confidential, and professional.
